gate_type: product-wide i18n (English default + Ukrainian switch) + product-copy rewrite + existing-SWA redeploy + commit/push to dev
scope_summary: Built product-wide i18n (typed catalog + Redux slice + useI18n hook, no new dependency) making English the default with a persisted EN/UA switcher near the profile avatar. Rewrote login into a product landing and removed ALL portfolio/walking-skeleton/architecture copy across the app, replacing it with insurance-claims-platform positioning. Rebuilt in backend mode, redeployed to the existing SWA (live API preserved). Independent Opus /qa-inspector CLEARED 9/9. Two commits pushed to origin/dev. PARTIAL: synthetic data-layer strings remain source-language (API-seed-fed on live; backend out of scope).
qa_inspector: Opus /qa-inspector END gate -> CLEARED 9/9 (git state, tsc clean, EN-default+switcher wiring, key parity, forbidden-copy absent in LIVE bundle, secrets clean, live EN+UA+CORS, no server/infra/workflow changes, main untouched)

i18n.mechanism: typed message catalog src/i18n/messages/* (18 namespaces) + Redux i18n slice + useI18n hook; no new dependency
i18n.default_language: English (first-time visitors; navigator/browser language NOT used to override)
i18n.switcher: EN/UA in TopBar (top-right, next to profile avatar) + login top-right; role=group, aria-pressed, keyboard/click
i18n.key_parity: type T = typeof en; const uk: T = {...} -> missing key is a compile error
i18n.coverage: login, sidebar, topbar, dashboard, claims list, claim workspace + 7 sub-pages, customer directory, guided walkthrough, claim tabs, 6 modals, deferred-action button

copy_rewrite.old: portfolio/demo 'walking skeleton' framing; 'Архітектура системи / Три шари' diagram; 'Portfolio message'; 'Azure-ready (next)'; 'Наступна фаза'
copy_rewrite.new: AI-Assisted Insurance Claims Workbench hero + value bullets; Platform capabilities cards; honest Demo environment status note
copy_rewrite.forbidden_terms_in_live_bundle: none (verified by grep on deployed index-C8i01ucW.js)

commits.message: docs: add Azure portfolio proof pack
feat: add English default and Ukrainian product copy

safety.workflow_note: azure-deploy-demo.yml is workflow_dispatch-only; push to dev did not trigger it
safety.commit_hook: QA commit-gate satisfied by genuine Opus /qa-inspector CLEARED + QA-CLEARED log line (no bypass for source commits)

limitations: synthetic data-layer strings (src/data/mock/*: golden-claim content, dashboard fallback labels) remain source-language; live panels are API-seed-fed -> require backend seed changes (out of scope this gate)
claims-list filter <option> values are logic-coupled (display + filter key) -> need value->label map (deferred)
/api/claims + /api/customers still 500 (Azure SQL deferred; SPA seed fallback)

next_recommended_gate.note: PRODUCT_I18N_QA_POLISH = data-layer i18n + value->label maps + backend seed localization; AZURE_SQL_OPTIONAL makes list endpoints live
